mdRecord.dcterms:title: Under Milk Wood by Dylan Thomas
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for Under Milk Wood by Dylan Thomas. Producing Director: Rex Partington. Directed by Richard Major. Production design by Christopher W. Carter. Costumes designed by Karen Brewster. Lighting Design by Timothy M. Chew. Stage Manager: Rick D. Todd.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
